title: PartyWoo Hot Pink Balloons 50 pcs 10 Inch Magenta Fuchsia Dark Pink Balloons for Valentine's Day Baby Shower Princess Birthday Party Decorations Pink-Y12
features: 50 PCS RAINBOW BALLOONS: Package includes 10 inch balloons (50 pcs), ideal birthday decorations, party decorations, wedding decorations , baby shower decorations
NON-TOXIC & SAFE: Made of latex, safe and non-toxic, recommended to use with a balloon hand pump or electric balloon pump
WHAT TO FILL WITH: Latex balloons filled with AIR will stay full for up to 72 hours, while with HELIUM will stay full for 3-6 hours. For best float results, fill helium 1-2 hours before your event

MULTIPLE APPLICATIONS: Ideal balloons for balloon garland and balloon arch as birthday decorations, party decorations, wedding decorations, baby shower decorations, anniversary decorations, themed party decorations

ATTENTION & WARNING: Please DO NOT overfill the balloons and also avoid sunburn, overheat, pointed object and excessive friction. Control the amount of air inflated into each balloon to achieve your ideal balloon size
description: Product Description PartyWoo Magenta Balloons, 52 pcs 10 Inch Hot Pink Balloons, Dark Pink Balloons for Balloon Garland or Balloon Arch as Birthday Party Decorations, Girl Baby Shower Decorations, Pink-Y12 Safety Warning Children can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Keep uninflated balloons away from children. Discard broken balloons at once.
